title: Service Template
description: ITSI service templates help you manage shared content for similar services. Services linked to a service template receive content from the service template, such as KPIs and entity rules. You must create a service template from an existing service. The `base_service_template` object contains KPI definitions, entity rules, and any linked services.

attributes.name: _key
attributes.label: _key
attributes.description: Auto-generated unique identifier for this service template.

attributes.name: description
attributes.label: description
attributes.description: User defined description for the service template.

attributes.name: title
attributes.label: title
attributes.description: Title of this service template.

attributes.name: kpis
attributes.label: kpis
attributes.description: Array of KPI descriptions for this service template.

attributes.name: entity_rules
attributes.label: entity_rules
attributes.description: Array of rules describing entities referenced by this service template.

attributes.name: service_id
attributes.label: service_id
attributes.description: _key value of the service this service template is generated from.

attributes.name: sec_grp
attributes.label: sec_grp
attributes.description: The team the service template belongs to. Service templates can only belong to default_itsi_security_group (Global team).

attributes.name: linked_services
attributes.label: linked_services
attributes.description: Array of services linked to this service template. if the user does not have access to all linked services, the linked_services field only contains the services they have read access to.

attributes.name: total_linked_services
attributes.label: total_linked_services
attributes.description: The number of services linked to this service template.

attributes.name: last_sync_error
attributes.label: last_sync_error
attributes.description: Error message if the last sync operation failed.

attributes.name: sync_status
attributes.label: sync_status
attributes.description: Sync status of service template: "synced", "sync_scheduled", "syncing", "sync failed".

attributes.name: scheduled_time
attributes.label: scheduled_time
attributes.description: The time to push service template changes to linked services if "sync later" is selected rather than "sync now".

attributes.name: scheduled_job
attributes.label: scheduled_job
attributes.description: Sync job detail if "sync later" is selected rather than "sync now".

attributes.name: template_tags
attributes.label: template_tags
attributes.description: The service tags contained within the template.

attributes.name: object_type
attributes.label: object_type
attributes.description: Name of the object type.

attributes.name: create_by
attributes.label: create_by
attributes.description: The user who created this object.

attributes.name: create_source
attributes.label: create_source
attributes.description: The sourcetype initiating create. Has value `manual` for user-initiated creates. For internal use only.

attributes.name: create_time
attributes.label: create_time
attributes.description: Timestamp at the time of creation based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: mod_source
attributes.label: mod_source
attributes.description: Sourcetype initiating modification. Has value `manual` for user-initiated modifications. For internal use only.

attributes.name: mod_time
attributes.label: mod_time
attributes.description: Timestamp of the last modification based on UTC time zone.

attributes.name: _owner
attributes.label: _owner
attributes.description: Splunk user `nobody`.

attributes.name: _user
attributes.label: _user
attributes.description: User who performed the most recent operation on this object.

attributes.name: version
attributes.label: version
attributes.description: The version of the object. Currently the same as the ITSI app version.
